exploration_notes: The investigation traces the full causal chain of phantom diffs for sensitive attributes. The root cause is an architectural split: provider-schema sensitivity marks (Sensitive: true) are only applied in evaluate.go:GetResource() for expression evaluation, never during refresh() or plan() in node_resource_abstract_instance.go. State serialization via instance_object.go:Encode() and statefile/version4.go only records marks from sensitive variable references in AttrSensitivePaths/sensitive_attribu
